reviews.title: Check the size
reviews.text: Disappointed, I read it wrong and thought these were official oral b replacement heads. It’s smaller than the original one on my sons toothbrush and just doesn’t feel durable. I guess time will tell.

reviews.title: Bristles are harder than advertised.
reviews.text:
The description states that it has 'Extra-Soft Bristles' which is why I purchased it.
I've found this is not the case.
They are not the hardest bristles, but they're not as soft as advertised.

reviews.title: Were they kidding?
reviews.text:
Not soft at all.
Has a piece that sticks out of the middle.
Totally inappropriate for children!
To be used with an Oral-B toothbrush that is so harsh?
I contacted the seller before I bought but never got a reply.

reviews.title: Good value
reviews.text: Good deal compared to buying name brand but they do feel like cheap plastic and they’re not the softest. Worth it though to save some money if you want to change them out as often as you should. The oral b brand replacements are too expensive IMO.

title: mushie Baby Finger Toothbrush (Tradewinds/Stone) 2-Pack
features: Help brushing go smoothly and begin building good habits with our silicone baby finger toothbrushes.
Designed in Sweden and made of soft, food-grade silicone, they slip onto your fingertip so you can gently clean your baby's teeth without irritating gums.
Hand wash in warm water. Replace every 3-4 months.
Caution: Not a toy. Adult supervision required under 3 years of age. Do not leave a child unattended with this product.

reviews.title: LOVE THESE BABY TOOTHBRUSHES!
reviews.text: I love everything from this brand. Mushie has the best baby silicone products and I wish I had bought the other products from Amazon so that I can write these reviews! I've been skeptical about using the cotton baby toothbrushes because I don't want any lint staying in my baby's mouth or it slipping off and be a potential choking hazard. This silicone toothbrush fits perfectly on my finger and makes it so much easier to brush his teeth rather than using a toothbrush and worrying about scraping the roof of his mouth. It's soft all around and has a silicone brush side to brush and a bumpy side for better gum stimulation. It comes in a pack of two and this brand has various modern colors. I highly recommend this product for infant brushing!

reviews.title: Great Product, easy to use!
reviews.text: My baby girl loved this toothbrush! It made brushing her teeth so easy and she loved it! She had so much fun brushing her teeth!

title: Dr. Collins Perio Toothbrush With Supersoft Bristles, Pink/White
description: The Dr. Collins Perio Toothbrush is unlike any other toothbrush on the market. With its innovative, patented tapering technique, the Perio Toothbrush features super slim polyester bristles that penetrate further between the teeth to remove plaque and debris. The Perio Toothbrush bristles are also ultra soft, reducing the likelihood of abrasion and recession while simultaneously allowing gentle gum stimulation. The polyester bristles of the Perio Toothbrush are less porous, creating a more hygienic brushing experience. The bristle also lasts approximately 50% longer than a standard nylon toothbrush. The Perio Toothbrush is great for all ages, including those undergoing orthodontic treatment, suffering from sensitivity or gum recession.
features: PME Edible Luster Spray 100ml. Use this Luster Spray on your Sugar Art projects!

reviews.title: Very soft, feels effective too
reviews.text: This is the softest toothbrush i have ever used.  I grew up believing that the harder the brush, the better for your teeth.  Now that i have almost no enamel left on my teeth i'm beginning to believe that softer might have been better all along.  These are super soft and almost fun to brush with.  I also bought the new Crest "chocolate" toothpaste!  If you're looking for a gentle and soft toothbrush, this is the one!

reviews.title: Excellent ultra soft  toothbrush
reviews.text: Dr Collins makes the best ultra soft toothbrush for excellent dental hygiene.... makes a big difference.... great purchase!!

reviews.title: Have used these for years and I really like them.
reviews.text: These perio toothbrushes are very comfortable and effective. I have used them for years. I like them better than the type brushes my dentist gives me with my 6 month cleaning visits.

reviews.title: Great product
reviews.text: Really like this toothbrush.

reviews.title: Excellent!
reviews.text: This toothbrush is the best brush out there imo. First of all, this brush only comes in a compact size, which is the size most people should be using (versus full). Second, the bristles are very soft and gentle and are all the same length... there is no scratchy feel like with some other brushes that have various length bristles to reach further under the gumline. These bristles are very gentle on gums yet clean them well. The best thing is that the brush really cleans the teeth. In my experience this toothbrush cleans better that the oral b line, better than mentadent pro care, better than reach, and better than the butler gum summit which has similar tapered bristles. This is a very good toothbrush that gets the job done gently but very effectively.

reviews.title: Clean Teeth &Gums
reviews.text: These toothbrushes are designed to clean teeth while simultaneous removing plaque from the gum line. The outer bristles angle out. I found the brush to be effective. The bristles are gentle. I have sensitive gums and they were not irritated or sore after use. Good brush.

reviews.title: Very wide
reviews.text: This is a good toothbrush. It is quite unusual. It is very, very wide. Make sure you see how much. I don't think I've ever seen one this wide. How it works for you is just going to depend on whether you like that. You can get a lot more at the same time, but some people may find it uncomfortable, especially if you have a small mouth. But it is a way to be very efficient and get a lot of areas. It feels well made. It seems like a quality brush.

reviews.title: Very wide
reviews.text: This is a good toothbrush. It is quite unusual. It is very, very wide. Make sure you see how much. I don't think I've ever seen one this wide. How it works for you is just going to depend on whether you like that. You can get a lot more at the same time, but some people may find it uncomfortable, especially if you have a small mouth. But it is a way to be very efficient and get a lot of areas. It feels well made. It seems like a quality brush.

reviews.title: Nothing fancy but does the job.
reviews.text: Toothbrushes are necessary and seem to be the one thing that I forget to purchase when I go to the store. So, ordering these Ooak toothbrushes was a no-brainer. These are not fancy. They are traditional toothbrushes that leave your teeth feeling smooth and clean (grit free). There are five rows of soft bristles…the three rows in the center are straight and the outside (colored) ones are slightly angled. The colors of the brushes are neutral, white and orange. The rubber grip handle makes it easy to grip and hold. And finally, on Amazon this two pack is under $7, which is reasonable when compared to other two packs on the market. I’d recommend these.

reviews.title: A unique set of toothbrushes
reviews.text: This toothbrush set has been designed in a V design for the bristles - which means that it looks different than other toothbrushes. The bristles have a lot of space to get in the gum line, in between teeth and works well. I got the medium bristles which are fine with me. I don't want too hard of a bristle, as that is not recommended by the dentist. This does a decent job cleaning.

reviews.title: Great for me.
reviews.text:
These are great for me! I've gotten better over the years, but I still tend to beat up and flatten toothbrushes by brushing too hard. These might help you to be conscious of that and calm down a little bit, but if you're really bent on brushing too hard, then they'll just give you hand cramps, since now you have to push harder and at an angle. ...hopefully they'll whip you into shape.

Even if you don't have that problem, they're good solid brushes. They seem to last a while and they leave my mouth feeling clean. I like the simpler heads like this, rather than all those weird newfangled things with all the plastic in them.

reviews.title: Nice For Medium Bristles
reviews.text: I like these toothbrushes. I prefer Soft bristles, but sometimes I want a deeper cleaning so the medium bristles are good for that on occasion. The overall design is nice, and I do feel like it keeps you from brushing too hard with the way it can flex and the bristle placement—it’s enough to get your teeth clean and it’s not so harsh and abrasive compared to some other brushes. It’s still a medium brush, so if you’re sensitive, stick with soft.

title: Traveling Panda Wheat Straw Toothbrushes Bulk, Soft Bristles Toothbrush with Toothpaste Built in, Travel Toothbrush Kit, Essentials for on The Go Teeth Brushing, 25 Mini Brushes
features: BULK WHEAT STRAW TRAVEL TOOTHBRUSH SET - 25 Mini travel toothbrushes made from planet conscious wheat straw. This bulk pack is great for families and frequent travelers!
KINDNESS FOR THE PLANET - Move away from plastic and say hello to sustainable toothbrushes designed with the planet in mind. Our zero waste toothbrush is made from wheat plant stems.
PRELOADED TOOTHBRUSH WITH TOOTHPASTE: The travel size toothbrush is prepasted with liquid no SLS, non fluoride toothpaste so you can brush your teeth anywhere!
SUSTAINABLE: The travel toothbrushes are renewable, sustainable, and made from a byproduct of wheat production. A natural toothbrush with zero BPA.
PORTABLE TOOTHBRUSH - Take these handy wheat straw toothbrushes on business trips, camping, road trips, and more! Great for kids and adults alike for when you’re on the go!

reviews.title: Convenient
reviews.text: I was interested to try these toothbrushes because I thought they might be good for camping, travel, etc. I have used a couple of them and I will definitely use the rest, but I probably won't purchase them in the future. The design seems a bit wasteful/odd, as the handle is quite thick and sturdy but rather short. It is hard for me to keep my grip as I brush because the handle is so short, and my hands are not even that big. I feel like I don't get as good of a cleaning/scrubbing because of the short handle. I think the manufacturer could make the handle a little less thick, but longer. I think it would be more effective if that were the case. Also, the taste is pretty bland and it doesn't leave a "fresh" taste (like a fresh minty taste) in my mouth. I know my teeth are probably clean, but it just doesn't feel or taste like I'm getting as good of a cleaning as I do with my regular-sized toothbrush and minty toothpaste. For a one or two day trip, they would be fine, but for anything longer, I'd want to bring a standard toothbrush.

reviews.title: Good for travel!
reviews.text: Good value for the price! Easy to travel and more sanitary than other travel brushes.

reviews.title: Convenient
reviews.text: These are convenient for travel.  Just pop them in my bag and I'm ready to go.

title: Philips Sonicare 4100 Electric Rechargeable Power Toothbrush, Black, with Genuine Optimal Plaque Control Replacement Toothbrush Heads, White, 3 Pack
description: Remove plaque and experience a deep, effective clean with Sonicare technology, removing up to 5x-7x more plaque vs. a manual toothbrush. Sonicare technology gently pulses water between your teeth, for a month's worth of manual brushing in just 2 minutes. The QuadPacer lets you know when you've spent the optimal amount of time on each section of your mouth while the SmarTimer signals when your 2 minutes is up. The pressure sensor flashes red to remind you to ease off, helping to prevent gum recession, while the 2 intensity settings ensure a comfortable clean that’s right for you. Going electric might feel like a big step, but with this brush you’re in safe hands. Its slim ergonomic design and familiar-shaped head gives you everything you need for an effective clean. The kit includes 1 Philips Sonicare 4100 electric toothbrush, 1 Optimal Plaque Control (C2) brush head and 1 USB charger (wall adaptor not included). An additional 3 pack of Optimal Plaque Control (C2) brush heads included.

reviews.title: Great for classroom pencil holders!!
reviews.text: I just got these, after failed attempts with dollar store pencil holders. These are sturdy, and  can hold a marker, Expo, and 2 pencils!! I will update if they break, but they seem very sturdy!! I would recommend them to all my teaching friends. If they can stand up to second graders, they will stand up to anyone needing these for travel!

reviews.title: I bought these for my double point knitting needlseT
reviews.text:
These are as promised, they come individually wrapped and are clean and free of manufacturing grease.
I am not using them for the intended purpose but they are great for storing my sets of dp needles. I can find the size I want immediately and they don't spread themselves all over the drawer where they're kept any longer.
They seem to stay together very well, I can recommend them for this purpose with no reserve.

reviews.title: Great to use as pencil holders!
reviews.text: I am using these as pencil holders for my students. They are working great so far!

title: Oral-B Kid's Toothbrush featuring Disney's Frozen, Soft Bristles, for Children and Toddlers 3+, 1 Count

Crest + Oral-B Stages helps kids brush their best with features designed to support healthy oral hygiene such as a tongue cleaner and Power Tip (soft) bristles to clean hard to reach teeth. So get Crest + Oral-B Stages to help your little ones practice proper oral care habits that will last them a lifetime.
features: Oral-B Toothbrush for children ages 5-7
Cushioned brush head is designed to help protect tender gums
Power Tip bristles designed to help clean hard to reach back teeth

reviews.title: Soft toothbrush with cute design
reviews.text: Study toothbrushes.  My toddlers love these toothbrushes and often request to have their teeth brushed just so they can hold their toothbrushes for a little while.  They would just wander around the house chomping on them throughout the day, if I allowed them too but, I know they aren't suppose to so I don't let them. :)  No bristles seem to be falling out and we have been using them for about a month at this point.  The bristles are quite soft and seem to be gentle enough for the toddler aged child.

title: RADIUS Tour Travel Brush & Case with Replaceable Brush Head ADA Accepted Toothbrush Improve Gum Health - Blue - Pack of 1
description: An innovative solution to maintaining your oral care on the go. The Tour Travel Toothbrush gives you the same deep clean you’ve come to expect from RADIUS, but with unique hide-away functionality that allows you to remove and store the brush head. It’s truly the ultimate in-transit must-have.
features: RADIUS UNFOLD SNAP BRUSH - A 2 in 1 toothbrush and travel case! Clean jack knife design for sleek and compact travel while still enjoying the luxurious RADIUS brushing experience!

REUSABLE & REPLACEABLE - Get the ultimate eco conscious usability. Perfect for any trip with a reusable handle and a replaceable head. No need for an additional travel case! 2 count Replacement Heads available online in Super Soft Floss, Soft and Medium.
SLIM NECK for easy reach in tight spaces and soft massaging bristles to help invigorate gum tissue for reduced chances of bleeding receding gums and enamel erosion.
ZERO PETROLEUM - wood-based handle and vegetable-based bristles for 100% eco-friendly travel. Free from all BPA, Phthalates and Latex.
AMERICAN MADE & ACCEPTED: All of our toothbrushes are made in the USA and Accepted by the American Dental Association.

reviews.title: A must for travellers

I had it first and my husband decided to get his too. We had an electric toothbrush but for travel it's easier to just use a eco conscious travel toothbrush.

title: Pyhralke Schallcare Replacement Brush Heads Fit for Braun Oral b, Precision Heads Compatible with Oral-B Pro1000/9600/5000/3000/1500/Genius and Smart Electric Toothbrush(4pcs)
features: Compatible with Oral-B , Deep Sweep, SmartSeries, ProSeries, Triumph, Advance Power, ProfessionalCare, ProfessionalCare SmartSeries, Vitality Floss Action, Vitality Dual Clean, Vitality CrossAction, Vitality Precision Clean, Vitality Pro White, Vitality Sensitive, Vitality TriZone.(Attention: DO NOT compatible with oral b io)

Schallcare brush heads, the bristles with bacterial protective function, which can prevent bacterial growth on the brush. Also with strong cleaning function, which can removes up to 3x more plaque along the gum line than a traditional manual toothbrush.

Safe, healthy, and durable. Made with soft and flexible DuPont bristles and approved to meet official dental health and safety standards. At the same time, the production of brush heads uses a unique process technique, which greatly enhances the durability of the toothbrush head.

The slightly longer bristles at both ends are designed to easily clean the oral blind area--every side of the innermost teeth, also clean the gap of teeth, for comprehensive cleaning, fresh breath, prevention of tooth decay.

The soft to middle bristles protect teeth from harmful hard brushes and offer a more comfortable cleaning, better for your teeth and gum health. Side-to-side bristles sweep away plaque while the moving power tip penetrates hard to reach areas and fixed filaments help to whiten the enamel, reaching the most difficult areas.

reviews.title: Good, but take a bit to soften
reviews.text: The first time I used these they made my gums bleed. It takes a bit for the bristles to soften up. The bristles also tend to look a bit frayed after a few weeks which definitely doesn’t happen with the name brand ones.

reviews.title: Every bit as good as the ones made by Oral-B
reviews.text:
I've been using Oral-B electric toothbrushes for 15-20 years and have always purchased replacement brushes made by them. This time I decided to see if I could save some money and give these a try, and I'm very glad that I did.

The only difference I can see between the Schallcare ones and the ones sold under the Oral-B Sensitive Care label is that these fit tighter, which results in a surprisingly large reduction in the noise level, and of course they only cost 1/3 as much. I've been using one the Schallcare brushes for about 6 weeks now and it shows absolutely no wear, so I think there's a good chance they will last every bit as long as the Oral-B brand ones.
